description: All engine features from the original card audit have been implemented. This file previously tracked 125 unimplemented ops, 35 trigger families, 13 target modes, 12 passive abilities, 8 action target modes, 5 cost reduction auras, and 3 other mechanisms. All have handlers in the engine as of 2026-03-24.
remaining_work: See unfixed_card_effects.md for remaining UI wiring issues (multi-target actions, hand-target modes for supports).
